Changed_Other.name: DFIntJoinLimitWin32x64
Changed_Other.mechanism: Sets a limit on the number of players that can join a game on 64-bit Windows systems.
Changed_Other.purpose: Ensures game stability by preventing overcrowding, leading to a better experience for players.
